title: Bluff: Animal Kingdom
description: One answer is fake — can you spot the bluff?

questions.question: What is the largest living bird by wingspan?
questions.explanation: The Wandering Albatross has the largest wingspan of any living bird, up to 3.5 meters.

questions.question: Which animal has the longest gestation period?
questions.explanation: African Elephants have a gestation period of about 22 months.

questions.question: What is the fastest fish in the ocean?
questions.explanation: The Sailfish can reach speeds of up to 110 km/h.

questions.question: Which mammal can hold its breath the longest underwater?
questions.explanation: Cuvier's Beaked Whale holds the record at nearly 4 hours underwater.

questions.question: What is the most venomous snake in the world?
questions.explanation: The Inland Taipan's venom is the most toxic of any land snake.

questions.question: Which insect can lift the most weight relative to its body?
questions.explanation: Dung Beetles can move objects over 1,000 times their body weight.

questions.question: Which animal has the best eyesight?
questions.explanation: Eagles can spot a rabbit from over 3 km away.

questions.question: What is the world's smallest mammal?
questions.explanation: The Bumblebee Bat weighs only about 2 grams.

questions.question: Which animal sleeps the most hours per day?
questions.explanation: Koalas sleep up to 22 hours per day due to their low-energy eucalyptus diet.

questions.question: Which ocean creature has three hearts?
questions.explanation: Octopuses have three hearts — two pump blood to the gills, one to the body.

questions.question: What is the loudest animal on Earth?
questions.explanation: Sperm Whale clicks can reach 230 decibels underwater.

questions.question: Which bird can fly backwards?
questions.explanation: Hummingbirds are the only birds that can sustain backward flight.

questions.question: What animal has the strongest bite force?
questions.explanation: The Saltwater Crocodile has the strongest measured bite at ~3,700 PSI.

questions.question: Which animal can regenerate its brain?
questions.explanation: Axolotls can regenerate their brain, heart, and limbs.

questions.question: What is the only mammal that can truly fly?
questions.explanation: Bats are the only mammals capable of true sustained flight.
